text.tspan: Optional multi-study meta-analysis — enabled when the sample sheet contains multiple compatible datasets
Shortcut entry points — skip earlier stages
all routes converge to one table
KEGG ORA & GSEA — any organism with a KEGG
Custom gene sets — GMT / annotation table
GSVA per-sample pathway activity (custom gene sets)
Genes-of-interest focused heatmap + expression panel + counts table
Extra stats — sample correlation (Pearson/Spearman), Wilcoxon concordance, MSigDB Hallmark set-overlap
